3293040.name: Crown Simulator - Royal Life simulation
3293040.description:
Crown Simulator is a royal life simulation where the player takes on the role of a powerful monarch. You must bear the heavy burden of managing your kingdom. The majestic throne room becomes the place where you meet your subjects, envoys from other kingdoms, and key advisors every day to help you make important decisions.

The main goal of the game is to maintain balance between four key aspects of the kingdom: relations with other kingdoms, the welfare of the people, the strength of the army, and the state of the treasury. Every decision you make directly affects the stability of your reign and the well-being of your realm. But ruling is more than just issuing decrees. You’ll need to consider political intrigue, growing threats from neighbors, popular uprisings, as well as relationships with nobles and key figures at court.

Gameplay revolves around simple yet thoughtful mechanics of choice. When a new challenge arises—whether it’s a peasant’s request, a diplomatic dispute, or a proposal to improve the castle’s defenses—you can swipe left, right, or down to make decisions. Maintaining strong alliances might upset the people, overspending from the treasury could weaken the army, and high taxes could spark rebellions.

Crown Simulator is a game where every choice matters, and the ability to find a delicate balance between all interests is the key to a long and successful reign.
3293040.supported_languages:
英语*, 俄语
*具有完全音频支持的语言

highlighted.name: And he rules for a long time...
Don't keep your friend too close
The people have their own plans
The army does not always protect the king
A strong army is not always trusted
A penny saved is a penny earned
Money should not only be saved
